shopping_144.POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE: The agent failed to provide an image link of the TV stand *without* the TV, as explicitly requested in the objective. The provided image link still contained the TV on the stand. The agent did not navigate to the product page to look for alternative images that might show just the stand.
shopping_144.REFLECTION: When an objective specifies a particular characteristic for an image (e.g., "without the TV"), it is crucial to verify that the selected image link strictly adheres to all specified criteria. If the initial image for an item does not meet the criteria, the agent should explore further by clicking on the item to access its product page, where additional images or different views might be available.

The agent failed to provide an image link of the TV stand *without* the TV, as explicitly requested in the objective. The provided image link still contained the TV on the stand. The agent did not navigate to the product page to look for alternative images that might show just the stand.

When an objective specifies a particular characteristic for an image (e.g., "without the TV"), it is crucial to verify that the selected image link strictly adheres to all specified criteria.
